name: Suspicious Network Traffic to Internal Web Server
notes: This rule triggers when an IP that matches known hostile IPs categorized by X-force scans the same URL multiple times.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Network Traffic match at least 1 times in 10 minutes after any of BB:Threats: Suspicious Network Traffic match
conditions_text: when BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Network Traffic match at least 1 times in 10 minutes after any of BB:Threats: Suspicious Network Traffic match
thresholds: when BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Network Traffic match at least 1 times in 10 minutes after any of BB:Threats: Suspicious Network Traffic match
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Network Traffic to Internal Web Server on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Network Traffic match at least 1 times in 10 minutes after any of BB:Threats: Suspicious Network Traffic match
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Network Traffic to Internal Web Server
Event description: Detects when an IP that matches known hostile IPs categorized by X-force scans the same URL multiple times.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
